name: SANTA emtricitabine and FTC/TAF MCI registry
summary: Recruiting phase 1b randomized double-blind placebo-controlled Singapore study testing emtricitabine and FTC/TAF in mild cognitive impairment or Alzheimer dementia, with safety, plasma AD biomarkers, inflammatory markers, cognitive, and ADL endpoints and no posted results.
population: Adults and older adults with mild cognitive impairment or Alzheimer dementia

trial_details.expected_results_window: No completion date is recorded locally; no near-term result expectation should be assumed.
trial_details.horizon_note: No posted results are represented locally, so surveillance should watch for registry results or linked publications.
trial_details.why_it_matters: Results matter for Transposon and Somatic Mutation Control because they can show whether the intervention changes safety, biomarkers, and function in Adults and older adults with mild cognitive impairment or Alzheimer dementia. That is still narrower than proof of broad aging reversal.
